headline: SpaceX teases AI device post-IPO; QCOM gains, Apple unfazed
summary: Investing.com -- Fresh off its historic debut on the public markets, Elon Musk’s SpaceX is keeping the momentum going. The newly public aerospace and tech giant has reportedly showcased a prototype AI-interaction device to investors. The hardware, described as sleeker and thinner than an Apple iPhone, marks an ambitious consumer tech play for the company. SpaceX presented the prototype to key stakeholders and institutional investors in a series of private meetings, according to a report from the
